hypothesis: On US500 M5, during NY cash session with EMA(50) slope positive and ADX>18, pullbacks to EMA(20) that hold above EMA(50) and close bullish provide high-probability continuation entries with PF>=2.0 and Sharpe>=1.5 over 200+ trades.

entry_rules.long: ema(20) > ema(50) AND ema(50) rising AND low <= ema(20) AND close > ema(20) AND close > open AND adx(14) > 18
entry_rules.short: ema(20) < ema(50) AND ema(50) falling AND high >= ema(20) AND close < ema(20) AND close < open AND adx(14) > 18

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.2 * atr(14) below signal-bar low (long) / above high (short)

notes: Diversifies family vs the two mean-reversion specs. US500 NY session only to ensure liquidity. Tight spread cap; lower risk per trade given M5 frequency.
